# Quebec Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector as amended by Law 25

Jurisdiction: Canada - Quebec
Region: CA-QC
Citation: Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector
Authority: Quebec LegisQuebec / CAI
Source URL: https://www.legisquebec.gouv.qc.ca/en/document/cs/P-39.1
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, cross_border_transfer, security_breach, automated_decision_making, accountability
Keywords: Quebec Law 25, privacy impact assessment, confidentiality incident, automated decision

## Summary
Quebec private-sector privacy law, strengthened by Law 25, with PIA, breach, transparency, cross-border, and automated-decision duties.

## Key compliance obligations
- Conduct PIAs for certain projects and cross-border disclosures.
- Notify confidentiality incidents and maintain records.
- Disclose automated decision-making and support rights.
